chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3472 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA No.877 / 2018. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For katcha peshi. 24-01-2018 Mr. Agha Waqar Ahmed advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. Today urgent application has been filed by the counsel for the petitioner, therefore, this matter is taken up for hearing. Both the parties are ready to argue the matter. Through this petition, the main grievance of the petitioner is that the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner without any justification. Learned A.A.G. files comments of respondents No.4 to 13, which are taken on record. Copy whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. In the comments, official respondents have denied the allegations as leveled by the petitioner, however, learned A.A.G. submits that official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of statement made by learned A.A.G., learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition, which is disposed of accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
